## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm start` and verified the affected views work
- [ ] Changes are focused (one logical change)
- [ ] Code style matches the surrounding code (vanilla JS, no framework)
- [ ] If the version was bumped, `CHANGELOG.md` has a matching entry
- [ ] I read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
